title: Luffy Breaks Through Krieg’s Arsenal — Part 3
scene: On pages 11–13, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy keeps pushing Don Krieg backward, proving that Krieg’s weapons cannot fully stop him.
summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
